questions.subject: Geomatics & Surveying
questions.stem: The reduced level of a benchmark is $100.000\,\text{m}$ and the backsight on it is $1.250\,\text{m}$. The height of instrument (HI) is _____ m.

questions.subject: Geomatics & Surveying
questions.stem: The height of instrument is $101.250\,\text{m}$ and the foresight on a point is $0.750\,\text{m}$. The reduced level of the point is _____ m.

questions.subject: Geomatics & Surveying
questions.stem: For a tacheometer with multiplying constant $100$ and additive constant $0$, a staff intercept of $1.2\,\text{m}$ on a horizontal sight gives a horizontal distance of _____ m.

questions.subject: Geomatics & Surveying
questions.stem: For a tacheometer with multiplying constant $100$ and additive constant $0$, a staff intercept of $0.85\,\text{m}$ on a horizontal sight gives a horizontal distance of _____ m.

questions.subject: Geomatics & Surveying
questions.stem: The whole-circle bearing of a line is $210^\circ$. Its reduced bearing magnitude (in the SW quadrant) is _____ degrees.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** In the third quadrant, RB $=$ WCB $-180^\circ$.

**Working.**
$$RB=210-180=30^\circ\ \text{S}30^\circ\text{W}.$$

**Answer.** $30^\circ$ (S30°W)

questions.subject: Geomatics & Surveying
questions.stem: A circular curve of radius $300\,\text{m}$ has a deflection (central) angle of $40^\circ$. The length of the curve is _____ m.

questions.subject: Geomatics & Surveying
questions.stem: A total station combines an electronic theodolite with
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Total station = theodolite + EDM + data processor.

**Working.**
EDM.

**Answer.** EDM

questions.subject: Geomatics & Surveying
questions.stem: Which statements about contour lines are correct?
options: Contours of different elevations never cross (except at a cliff/overhang)
Closely spaced contours indicate steep ground
A contour line joins points of equal elevation
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Contours join equal elevations, crowd on steep ground and don't cross except at overhangs; they are not straight in general.

**Working.**
Options 1, 2, 4.

**Answer.** Equal elevation, steep crowding, no crossing
